keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY CHEST AND LUNGS. Chest and lungs : Aco., Ant-t., Arn., Ars., Bry., Calc-c., Chel., Chin., Dulc., Fer-p., Iod., Ip., Kali-c., Lyc., Op., Pho., Pul., Ran-b., Rhus-t., Sang., Seneg., Spig., Squil., Stan., Sul., Ver-v. Chest and lungs, right : Arn., Ars., Bell., Bry., Carb-an., Chel., Colch., Coloc., Iod., Kali-c., Lach., Lyc., Mur-ac., Psor., Pul., Sil. Chest and lungs, right, into right arm : Hyds., Kre., Lob., Pho., Phyt., Plb., Sang. Chest and lungs, right, to left : Aco., Lach., Petr. Chest and lungs, left : Am-m., Arg-m., Arg-n., Calc-c., Con., Euphorb., Flu-ac., Kali-c., Kali-n., Laur., Lyc., Nat-s., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pho., Rhus-t., Seneg., Stan., Sul. Chest and lungs, left, last rib : Arg-n. Chest and lungs, left to right : Ap., Calc-c., Grap., Kre., Pho., Plb., Zin. Chest and lungs, changing about in : Aco., Alu., Arg-n., Bell., Cact., Caust., Colch., Fer., Lyc., Mag-m., Merc., Nat-c., Pho., Pul., Seneg. Chest and lungs, alternating sides : Agar., Ap., Ars., Calc-c., Cimi., Dulc., Grap., Hyper., Lyc., Mang., Mos., Pho., Plb., Ran-b., Rum., Thu. Chest and lungs, upper : Calc-c., Iod., Mang., Pul., Stan. Chest and lungs, middle : Calc-c., Dulc., Kali-bi., Phel., Sep. Chest and lungs, backward, extending : Ars., Bry., Calc-c., Caps., Carb-v., Chel., Con., Cup., Kali-bi., Lil-t., Merc., Nat-m., Pho., Sep., Spig., Sul., Ther. Chest and lungs, backward, extending, right : Ars., Carb-v., Chel., Merc., Sep. Chest and lungs, backward, extending, left : Lil-t., Lyc., Nat-m., Spig., Ther. Chest and lungs, backward, extending, intercostal : Amy-n., Cimi., Sil. Chest and lungs, downward : Ag-c., Kali-bi. Chest and lungs, downward, right : Dulc., Nit-ac., Sang., Sep. Chest and lungs, downward, left : Kali-c., Laur., Pho., Pul., Squil., Zin. Chest and lungs, forward : Berb., Bor., Bry., Castr., Kali-c., Kali-n., Psor., Rat., Sep., Sul. Chest and lungs, forward, right : Aco., Coloc., Merc. Chest and lungs, forward, left : Agar., Bar-c., Bry., Lac-c., Naj., Pho., Sul., Thu., Zin. Chest and lungs, upward : Ars., Calc-c., Caust., Lach., Mang., Mur-ac., Thu. Chest and lungs, upward, right : Arn., Plat., Thu. Chest and lungs, upward, right to left : Petr. Chest and lungs, upward, left : Am-m., Bov., Coc-c., Kali-c., Laur., Med., Spig., Squil., Stan., Zin. Chest and lungs, upward, left to right : Calc-c., Carb-v., Grap., Ign., Lil-t. Chest and lungs, transversely : Caust., Thu. Chest and lungs, transversely, arms to : Alu. Chest and lungs, anxiety in : Bry. Chest and lungs, burning : Aco., Ap., Ars., Canth., Carb-v., Lyc., Pho., Sang., Spo., Sul. Chest and lungs, coldness : Ars., Bry., Carb-an., Kali-c., Nat-c., Old., Sul. Chest and lungs, congestion : Aco., Cact., Fer-p., Fer., Pho., Seneg., Sul., Ver-v. Chest and lungs, constriction , cramp in : Cact., Fer., Mos., Nux-v., Sul., Tab. Chest and lungs, fulness : Glo., Pho., Sul. Chest and lungs, hold , must : Bry., Dros., Eup-p., Nat-s. Chest and lungs, hollow , empty, as if : Cocc., Pho., Stan. Chest and lungs, lump , plug, etc., as of : Am-m., Amb., Anac., Bur-p., Cup., Kali-c., Lach., Lil-t., Nat-c., Nux-m., Pho., Ran-sc., Stict., Sul., Tarx., Zin. Chest and lungs, morning , agg. : Calc-c., Carb-v. Chest and lungs, paralysis (of lungs) : Ant-t., Ars., Bar-c., Op., Pho. Chest and lungs, pleurisy : Aco., Bry., Kali-c., Sul. Chest and lungs, pneumonia and bronchitis : Aco., Ant-t., Bry., Kali-bi., Lyc., Merc., Pho., Rhus-t., Sul., Ver-v. Chest and lungs, pneumonia and bronchitis, capillary : Ant-t. , Fer-p., Ip. Chest and lungs, pneumonia and bronchitis, senile : Am-c., Ant-c., Ant-t., Ars., Kre. Chest and lungs, pressure (heavy) : Aur., Fer., Lach., Nux-v., Pho. Chest and lungs, pressure, amel. : Bry. Chest and lungs, pulsation : Asaf., Cact., Sul. Chest and lungs, pulsation, right : Asar., Crot-t., Dig., Ign., Indg., Paeon., Pho. Chest and lungs, pulsation, left : Am-m., Cann., Glo., Men. Chest and lungs, soreness : Pho., Stan. Chest and lungs, spots in : Agar., Nat-m., Seneg., Thu. Chest and lungs, sticking : Aco., Bry., Kali-c., Pho., Rhus-t., Squil., Sul. Chest and lungs, stringy : Kali-bi. Chest and lungs, tightness : Ars., Aur., Caust., Ip., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Sul. Chest and lungs, tightness, right : Am-m., Cocc., Sul. Chest and lungs, tightness, left : Grap., Lyc., Sul-ac. Chest and lungs, weakness : Calc-c., Carb-v., Kali-c., Nit-ac., Stan., Sul. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
